rag_rules: Preserve existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Use visible identifiers from the current model or explicit declarations
Avoid encoding AADL properties as AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
generic_rules: Maintain scope consistency when inserting annex blocks
Preserve existing component structure during fusion
Use only grounded identifiers in AGREE expressions
Avoid assumptions or guarantees that reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks use `annex agree {** ... **};` syntax
Component type contracts should be placed in component type annexes
Implementation-level bindings should be placed in implementation annexes
anti_patterns: Do not place assumptions or guarantees in component type contracts that reference subcomponent ports
Avoid encoding AADL properties as AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
Do not use unresolved references to AADL properties inside AGREE annex blocks
irrelevant_topics: AGREE syntax for assume, guarantee, assign, and validator
